settings.heading: READ THE NETWORK. EXPLORE THE CULTURE.
settings.subheading: Mempool Surf Club is a place to explore Bitcoin culture, understand how the network works, read the conditions shaping it, and discover objects that carry the culture forward.

settings.heading: Four ways to move through the same ocean.
settings.copy: Explore the culture, learn how Bitcoin works, read network conditions, and discover physical collections built around the ideas moving through it.
settings.tools_heading: Know what conditions matter before you move.
settings.tools_copy: Fees, transaction demand, mining conditions, and blockspace all reveal a different part of the network.
